'''Arada Turhaya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and was a hero in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was the father of [[Jamie Turhaya|Jamie]] and [[Matt Turhaya|Matt]], and had died by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Passages" />
